summary: Comprehensive testing of Ayur Vaidya app completed. All requested features verified: 20 categories, 76 medicines, 16 practitioners with new cities (Sri Lanka: Colombo, Kandy, Galle, Jaffna; India: Pune, Ahmedabad, Kolkata, Lucknow). Landing page UI improvements verified with good contrast and all new sections present.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - health check should be at /api/health

passed_tests: Categories include hair, eyes, heart, kidney, women, men, children, weight, bp, cholesterol
GET /api/practitioners/cities includes Colombo, Kandy, Galle, Jaffna (Sri Lanka)
GET /api/practitioners/cities includes Pune, Ahmedabad, Kolkata, Lucknow (India)
Landing page loads with hero section showing Ayur Vaidya
Landing page has 'How It Works' section with 3 steps
Landing page has '20 Health Categories' grid section with 20 items
Landing page has 'Find Practitioners Near You' section with India and Sri Lanka
Landing page hero text has improved contrast (white text rgb(255,255,255))
Landing page CTA button 'Get Started Free' is visible
Landing page Trust section with 3 trust indicators
Landing page Three Doshas section (Vata, Pitta, Kapha)
seed_data_creation: Database already seeded with 20 categories, 76 medicines, 16 practitioners
context_for_next_testing_agent: All API endpoints working correctly. Database seeded with expanded data. Landing page has all new sections. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_ayurveda_api.py covers categories, medicines, practitioners, and symptoms APIs.
